name: BOBCARD Etihad Guest Credit Card

domestic: 8 complimentary domestic airport lounge visits per calendar year (limited to 2 visits per quarter).
Access is powered by the DreamFolks web-access portal and requires card tokenization and generating a QR code.
A cooling-off period of 5 hours applies between consecutive visits at the same lounge outlet.
international: 4 complimentary international airport lounge visits per calendar year (limited to 1 visit per quarter) via DreamFolks web-access portal or Priority Pass.

exclusions: Spends at financial institutions (cash advances, repayments, etc.)

specialSpendRules.notes: Rent payments earn no rewards and incur a 1% processing fee.
Utility payments earn no rewards and utility spends of Rs 50,000 or above incur a 1% processing fee (capped at Rs 3,000).

joiningBenefits: Complimentary Silver Tier membership in the Etihad Guest program.
Up to 7,500 bonus Etihad Guest Miles: 5,000 miles on spending Rs 25,000 and another 2,500 miles on cumulative spends of Rs 50,000 within the first 60 days of card issuance.

joiningBenefitsValued.label: Up to 7,500 Etihad Guest Miles welcome bonus

renewalBenefits: Annual fee waived on spends of Rs 3 lakh or more in the preceding anniversary year.

milestones.label: 250 bonus miles on completing 4 transactions totaling Rs 25,000 in a month
2,000 bonus miles on quarterly spends of Rs 2,00,000
12,000 bonus miles on annual spends of Rs 7.5 lakh

additionalBenefits: 1% fuel surcharge waiver on transactions between Rs 400 and Rs 4,000 across fuel stations in India.
Complimentary Silver Tier status offering 25% bonus miles on Etihad flights and extra baggage allowance.
additionalDetails: Etihad Guest Miles are credited directly to your Etihad Guest account and are redeemable only through the Etihad platform for travel rewards.

salaried: Annual income of Rs 18 lakh or more
selfEmployed: Annual income of Rs 18 lakh or more

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-17.
Audited against the official BOBCARD Etihad Guest product page and terms on 2026-06-17.

Etihad Guest Miles are brand-locked in the Etihad ecosystem, so rewardLiquidity is set to brand-locked. Internal ranking values miles at Rs 0.80 (rewardLiquidityFactor 0.8); display keeps the Rs 1.0 ecosystemValue.
Standard monthly, quarterly, and annual spends milestones mapped under structured milestones list.
Lounge access terms and DreamFolks web portal tokenization requirements documented in lounge/internalNotes.
